# Docker images used by integration tests via testcontainers-go.
# Central versioning manifest. Each `integration-matrix` shard in
# .github/workflows/test.yml caches and pulls a SUBSET of these
# images — the shard's `matrix.images` literal names which ones.
#
# This file plays two roles in the workflow:
#   1. Cache-key hashing — every shard's docker-image cache key
#      includes this file's hash, so editing any line busts every
#      shard's image cache. Bump a tag here to force a fresh pull.
#   2. Documentation — the full list of images the integration suite
#      can touch, for ops review and security scanning.
#
# Pin tags rather than `latest` where possible to keep CI deterministic.
# Update the corresponding tests when bumping versions here.

postgres:16-alpine
nats:2-alpine
redis:7-alpine
bitnamilegacy/postgresql:16
minio/minio:latest
